quote: Arnold restored my vintage 1930s radio to like-new condition. The finish and color matching were extraordinary. You would never know it had been damaged.
author: Marc Entsminger

quote: They restored my grandfather's settee with impeccable craftsmanship. It is truly a masterpiece, and I am proud to pass it down to my children knowing it will last another generation.
author: Nancy Volkert

quote: Arnold and his team did an amazing job on my grandmother's dining table. The craftsmanship and attention to detail were outstanding. Highly recommend.
author: Chris S.

quote: Had a 150-year-old family chair restored. Worth every penny of the $1,200. It looks brand new while keeping all of its original character.
author: John Murray

quote: Quick turnaround and great skills. Arnold clearly knows what he is doing and genuinely cares about the work.
author: Antonio Valentino

quote: Best antique restorations in DFW. No one else comes close to the quality of work ARED delivers.
author: Chase Green
